instanceGeneral.title: General
instanceGeneral.subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instanceGeneral.locale.title: Language
instanceGeneral.locale.description: Choose the UI language for this browser. Missing translations fall back to English.
instanceGeneral.censor.title: Censor username in logs
instanceGeneral.censor.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
instanceGeneral.shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.backup.title: Backup retention
instanceGeneral.backup.description: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
instanceGeneral.feedback.title: AI feedback sharing
instanceGeneral.feedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneral.feedback.prompt: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceGeneral.feedback.option.notAllow: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceGeneral.feedback.help.full: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the {{preferenceKey}} key from the {{settingsTable}} JSON row for this instance, or set it back to {{promptValue}}. Unset and {{promptValue}} both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instanceGeneral.signOut.title: Sign out
instanceGeneral.signOut.description: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
instanceSidebar.title: Instance Settings
instanceHeartbeats.error.disableMultiple: Failed to disable {{failed}} of {{enabled}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
instanceHeartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceHeartbeats.subtitle: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceHeartbeats.disableAll.confirm.me: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
instanceHeartbeats.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.subtitle: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimental.isolated.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
instanceExperimental.isolated.descriptio: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimental.autoRestart.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
instanceExperimental.autoRestart.descrip: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instancePlugins.title: Plugin Manager
instancePlugins.install.title: Install Plugin
instancePlugins.install.description: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
instancePlugins.alpha.title: Plugins are alpha.
instancePlugins.alpha.description: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
instancePlugins.available.title: Available Plugins
instancePlugins.available.empty: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
instancePlugins.installed.title: Installed Plugins
instancePlugins.installed.emptyDescripti: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
instancePlugins.uninstall.title: Uninstall Plugin
instancePlugins.uninstall.description: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
instancePlugins.errorDetails.title: Error Details
instancePlugins.errorSummary.none: Plugin entered an error state without a stored error message.
adapterManager.title: Adapters
adapterManager.install.title: Install External Adapter
adapterManager.install.description: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
adapterManager.install.localHelp: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.
adapterManager.externalAlpha.title: External adapters are alpha.
adapterManager.externalAlpha.description: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
adapterManager.external.title: External Adapters
adapterManager.external.emptyDescription: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
adapterManager.builtin.title: Built-in Adapters
adapterManager.uninstall.title: Remove Adapter
adapterManager.uninstall.description: Are you sure you want to remove the {{type}} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.{{cleanupNote}} This action cannot be undone.
adapterManager.uninstall.cleanupNote: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.
adapterManager.reinstall.title: Reinstall Adapter
adapterManager.reinstall.description: This will pull the latest version of {{packageName}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
pluginSettings.sections.author: Author
pluginSettings.sections.settingsEmpty: This plugin does not require any settings.
pluginSettings.sections.runtimeDashboard: Worker process, scheduled jobs, and webhook deliveries
Runtime diagnostics are unavailable right now.
pluginSettings.sections.recentLogs.title: Recent Logs
pluginSettings.sections.health.title: Health Status
pluginSettings.sections.health.readyHint: Health checks run once the plugin is ready.
